description: Welcome to Citadel Heights, a well-kept 3-bedroom, 2-storey townhouse in a family-friendly neighbourhood. The bright main floor offers open living & dining areas highlighted by a cozy gas fireplace and access to a patio overlooking a beautiful shared green space. The large kitchen provides plenty of room for everyday living, and the carpets have been professionally cleaned for move-in comfort. Upstairs features a generous primary bedroom with a 3-piece ensuite, plus 2 additional bedrooms with deep closets and access to a private covered balcony. Ideally located close to schools, Fraser River walking trails & with easy access to major commuter routes. Open House Saturday Feb 14, 1:30-3:30PM & Sunday Feb 15, 2-4PM
